_comment: This is a valid JSON example for NoteKar remote notifications. JSON does not support // comments, so documentation is stored in _docs fields. Your live notifications.json can keep or remove these _docs fields; NoteKar ignores unknown fields.

_docs.enabled: Boolean. true means this notice can be shown. false disables it without deleting the file.
_docs.id: Required unique string. Change this when you want users to see a new notification. Example: release-3-0-6 or maintenance-2026-06-01.
_docs.title: Notification title shown by the operating system.
_docs.body: Notification message shown below the title.
_docs.url: Where to open/focus when the user taps the notification. Use ./ for app home, ./?action=note for note popup, or a full URL.
_docs.channels: Array of update channels allowed to receive this notice. Use ["stable"], ["beta"], or ["stable", "beta"].
_docs.maxShows: Maximum number of times this notice may be shown on one device/browser for this id.
_docs.cooldownHours: Minimum hours between repeats for this id. Use 0 for immediate retesting.
_docs.showAfter: Optional ISO date/time. Notice will not show before this time.
_docs.showUntil: Optional ISO date/time. Notice will not show after this time.
_docs.icon: Optional notification icon path or full URL. Recommended: ./icon-192.png.
_docs.badge: Optional Android notification badge path. Recommended: ./icon-maskable-192.png.

showOnceToEveryone.title: NoteKar Update
showOnceToEveryone.body: A new NoteKar update is ready with safer deletes and improved exports.

betaOnlyNotice.title: Beta Update
betaOnlyNotice.body: A new beta build is ready for testing.

scheduledNotice.title: Planned Maintenance
scheduledNotice.body: Some update checks may be slower during maintenance.

testingMode.title: Test Notice
testingMode.body: This is a live notification test.

title: NoteKar Update
